penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - no clear completion visible with suture cut inside trainer.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude identified incomplete task with no clear completion visible, while GPT-4o reported full completion in 95 seconds. Given the fundamental requirement that both suture ends must be cut inside the trainer for task completion, and Claude's specific observation that this completion state was not clearly visible, the incomplete task assessment takes precedence. The presence of title cards at the end suggests this may be a demonstration rather than a complete timed performance.

disagreements.rationale: Task completion requires both suture ends cut inside trainer. Claude's observation that this completion state was not clearly visible takes precedence over GPT's timing claim.

claude_value.description: Task appears incomplete - no clear completion visible with suture cut inside trainer.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is an automatic-zero condition that overrides all other scoring when the required completion criteria are not met.
If the task completion was not clearly visible as Claude observed, then the suture_cut phase should not be included in the detected phases.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of time or other performance factors.
